etymology: Saint Isidore of Seville, patron of the internet/knowledge
wordplay_note: Chickenhead = degraded intellect; Isidore = keeper of knowledge
card_description: Isidore (J.R.) (meaning "Saint Isidore of Seville, patron of the internet/knowledge") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Radiation-damaged special (chickenhead) who shelters fugitive androids out of compassion. Name note: Chickenhead = degraded intellect; Isidore = keeper of knowledge. His empathy surpasses the humans who hunt androids — the least capable is the most human. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
